hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】摩根大通的杰米戴蒙发出模糊的信贷衰退警告，但债券市场有更紧迫的问题；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：海湾袭击有可能重新点燃冲突；【WORLD】随着世界因伊朗战争而分心，以色列定居者加剧了对约旦河西岸的袭击。

items.title: JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon issued vague credit recession warning, but the bond market has more pressing issues
items.summary: As fears about a credit crisis rise, bond investors may be too complacent with Kevin Warsh to become next Fed chair and volatility in rates likely to follow.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通的杰米戴蒙发出模糊的信贷衰退警告，但债券市场有更紧迫的问题
items.summary_zh: 随着对信贷危机的担忧加剧，债券投资者可能对凯文·沃什(Kevin Warsh)成为下一任美联储主席过于自满，利率可能随之波动。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Attacks in Gulf Threaten to Reignite Conflict
items.summary: The authorities in the United Arab Emirates blamed Iran for a drone attack, and U.S. Central Command said Army Apache helicopter gunships destroyed six Iranian military speedboats.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：海湾袭击有可能重新点燃冲突
items.summary_zh: 阿拉伯联合酋长国当局指责伊朗发动了无人机袭击，美国中央司令部表示，陆军阿帕奇武装直升机摧毁了六艘伊朗军用快艇。

items.title: With World Distracted by Iran War, Israeli Settlers Intensify Attacks in West Bank
items.summary: Israel has failed to arrest a wave of violence against Palestinians, prompting military officials to urge the government to intervene.
items.title_zh: 随着世界因伊朗战争而分心，以色列定居者加剧了对约旦河西岸的袭击
items.summary_zh: 以色列未能阻止针对巴勒斯坦人的暴力浪潮，促使军方官员敦促政府进行干预。

items.title: Shopify and National Bank of Canada are among backers of a new digital currency built to settle trades 24/7
items.summary: Tetra Trust's new stablecoin, CADD, is aimed at institutional use for 24/7 cross-border settlement, real-time corporate treasury, and direct fintech transfers, replacing legacy batch systems.
items.title_zh: Shopify 和加拿大国家银行是一种新数字货币的支持者，该货币旨在 24/7 进行交易结算
items.summary_zh: Tetra Trust 的新稳定币 CADD 旨在供机构使用，用于 24/7 跨境结算、实时企业财务和直接金融科技转账，取代传统的批处理系统。

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 在 FedRAMP 中可用
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 可通过 FedRAMP 对 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 OpenAI API 进行中等授权，从而为美国联邦机构提供安全的 AI 采用。

items.title: Wall Street giant DTCC plans tokenized securities platform with July pilot, October launch
items.summary: Clearing giant's move toward live tokenization market adds weight to Wall Street's blockchain push.
items.title_zh: 华尔街巨头 DTCC 计划代币化证券平台于 7 月进行试点，10 月启动
items.summary_zh: 清算巨头向实时代币化市场的举动增加了华尔街推动区块链的力度。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Traffic in the Strait of Hormuz won’t return to normal until August or later, according to Kalshi traders
items.summary: With a lack of a breakthrough in negotiations between the U.S. and Iran, traders increasingly see traffic returning to normal later and later.
items.title_zh: 卡尔什贸易商表示，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到八月或更晚才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 由于美国和伊朗之间的谈判缺乏突破，交易员越来越认为交通恢复正常的时间越来越晚。

items.title: Berkshire shares trade lower even after Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
items.summary: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.
items.title_zh: 即使阿贝尔在会议上取得好成绩、盈利大幅增长，伯克希尔股价仍走低
items.summary_zh: 阿贝尔对伯克希尔庞大企业的坚定控制让投资界的许多人感到放心。

items.title: Greg Abel earns solid scorecard from Berkshire shareholders after first annual meeting
items.summary: The reviews from longtime shareholders and professional investors were broadly positive, even as many acknowledged the notable absence of Warren Buffett.
items.title_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔在第一次年度会议后从伯克希尔股东那里获得了良好的记分卡
items.summary_zh: 长期股东和专业投资者的评价总体上是积极的，尽管许多人承认沃伦·巴菲特明显缺席。

items.title: U.S. oil prices will exceed Iran wartime high to above $125 as conflict drags on, Kalshi traders say
items.summary: The April 7 high of $113 in Western Texas Intermediate crude futures will likely be broken, traders on the prediction markets platform think.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员表示，随着冲突持续下去，美国油价将超过伊朗战时高点，达到 125 美元以上
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的交易员认为，西德克萨斯中质原油期货 4 月 7 日高点 113 美元可能会被打破。

items.title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
items.summary: The operator of the MV Hondius ship says a Dutch husband and wife, as well as a German national, have died but the cause has not yet been established.
items.title_zh: 大西洋游轮疑似病毒爆发 三人死亡
items.summary_zh: MV Hondius 轮船的运营商表示，一对荷兰夫妇以及一名德国公民已经死亡，但死因尚未确定。

items.title: Ukrainian drone hits upmarket Moscow high-rise ahead of Victory Day celebrations
items.summary: Russia has declared a unilateral ceasefire to cover the event and threatened a massive strike on central Kyiv if it were disrupted.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰无人机在胜利日庆祝活动前袭击莫斯科高档高层建筑
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯已宣布单方面停火以报道这一事件，并威胁称，如果事件受到干扰，将对基辅市中心发动大规模袭击。

items.title: How the Kremlin Lures Africans Into Russia’s War in Ukraine
items.summary: A growing number of men across the continent say they are being promised jobs in Russia, only to be forced into the war. Some go as mercenaries, but many more are drawn unwittingly.
items.title_zh: 克里姆林宫如何引诱非洲人加入俄罗斯乌克兰战争
items.summary_zh: 非洲大陆越来越多的男性表示，俄罗斯向他们承诺提供工作机会，结果却被迫参战。有些人成为雇佣兵，但更多的人是在不知不觉中被吸引的。

items.title: Aave fights court-ordered $73 million ETH freeze, argues ‘a thief does not own what he steals’
items.summary: Aave LLC filed an emergency motion in federal court seeking to lift an order that froze ether tied to last month's Kelp DAO exploit.
items.title_zh: Aave 反对法院下令冻结 7300 万美元 ETH，辩称“小偷并不拥有他所偷的东西”
items.summary_zh: Aave LLC 向联邦法院提交了一项紧急动议，寻求解除与上个月的 Kelp DAO 漏洞相关的冻结以太币的命令。

items.title: South Korea’s largest crypto exchange Upbit launches Ethereum blockchain with Optimism Foundation support
items.summary: Upbit is the Optimism Foundation's first client on its "self-managed" enterprise tier, giving it control over its core rollup architecture.
items.title_zh: 韩国最大的加密货币交易所 Upbit 在乐观基金会的支持下推出以太坊区块链
items.summary_zh: Upbit 是 Optimism 基金会“自我管理”企业层的第一个客户，使其能够控制其核心汇总架构。

items.title: SEC pumps the brakes on prediction market ETFs set to debut this week: Reuters
items.summary: The prediction market ETFs covered U.S. election outcomes, layoffs in the tech sector and the liklihood of a recession.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会对本周推出的预测市场 ETF 踩刹车：路透社
items.summary_zh: 预测市场 ETF 涵盖了美国大选结果、科技行业裁员以及经济衰退的可能性。

items.title: FINRA green lights Securitize for tokenized IPO underwriting and custody
items.summary: Securitize is the first firm to receive FINRA approval to custody tokenized securities and underwrite onchain IPOs and secondary offerings.
items.title_zh: FINRA 为代币化 IPO 承销和托管证券化开绿灯
items.summary_zh: Securitize 是第一家获得 FINRA 批准托管代币化证券并承销链上 IPO 和二次发行的公司。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Hut 8 swaps Coinbase loan for cheaper FalconX deal, slashing borrowing costs as it bets big on AI
items.summary: A new $200 million, 364-day bitcoin-backed facility replaces the Coinbase Credit arrangement, cutting debt costs by 200 basis points.
items.title_zh: Hut 8 将 Coinbase 贷款换成更便宜的 FalconX 交易，大力押注人工智能，从而大幅削减借贷成本
items.summary_zh: 一项新的 2 亿美元、364 天的比特币支持设施取代了 Coinbase 信贷安排，将债务成本削减了 200 个基点。

items.title: Circle, Coinbase lead crypto stocks rally amid Clarity Act progress, bitcoin hitting $80,000
items.summary: The market is starting to price in potential winners as stablecoin yield compromise opens path for passing key U.S. digital asset regulation, one analyst said.
items.title_zh: Circle、Coinbase 引领加密股上涨，《澄清法案》取得进展，比特币触及 80,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 一位分析师表示，随着稳定币收益率妥协为通过美国关键数字资产监管开辟了道路，市场开始消化潜在的赢家。

items.title: Tom Lee says 'crypto spring' started as largest Ethereum treasury buys $238 million in ether
items.summary: Bitmine's latest ETH purchase comes as Lee cited progress on digital asset regulation CLARITY Act as a key catalyst for crypto markets.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 表示“加密春天”始于最大的以太坊财政部购买了 2.38 亿美元的以太币
items.summary_zh: Bitmine 最新购买 ETH 之际，Lee 将数字资产监管 CLARITY Act 的进展视为加密市场的关键催化剂。

items.title: Binance is launching a withdrawal lock to help deter crypto wrench attacks
items.summary: The lock is meant to protect users from being forced into withdrawing their funds, though it's an internal policy and not a cryptographic lock.
items.title_zh: 币安正在推出提款锁，以帮助阻止加密扳手攻击
items.summary_zh: 该锁旨在保护用户免遭被迫撤回资金，尽管这是一项内部政策而不是加密锁。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) jumps 4.1% over the weekend
items.summary: Chainlink (LINK), up 2.7% since Friday, was also a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Bittensor (TAO) 周末上涨 4.1%
items.summary_zh: Chainlink (LINK) 自周五以来上涨 2.7%，也是表现最好的。

items.title: Coinbase-incubated Base network adopts Succinct’s zero-knowledge tech
items.summary: Base, launched as an optimistic rollup, is hybridizing its tech stack with Succinct's SP1 zero-knowledge virtual machine.
items.title_zh: Coinbase孵化的Base网络采用Succinct的零知识技术
items.summary_zh: Base 作为 Optimistic Rollup 推出，正在将其技术堆栈与 Succinct 的 SP1 零知识虚拟机混合在一起。

items.title: DTC to begin tokenized asset rollout in July ahead of full launch as it gets feedback from BlackRock, Circle and others
items.summary: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation will roll out its tokenization service as it gathers feedback from firms like BlackRock to Circle.
items.title_zh: DTC 收到贝莱德、Circle 等公司的反馈后，将于 7 月全面推出代币化资产
items.summary_zh: 存款信托与清算公司将在收集 BlackRock 和 Circle 等公司的反馈后推出其代币化服务。

items.title: Crypto VC Haun Ventures raises $1 billion for funds investing in blockchain and AI
items.summary: Last year, Haun Ventures was reportedly seeking to raise $1 billion to launch two new crypto-focused funds.
items.title_zh: Crypto VC Haun Ventures 为投资区块链和人工智能的基金筹集了 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 据报道，去年 Haun Ventures 寻求筹集 10 亿美元来推出两只新的加密货币基金。

items.title: Western Union launches USDPT stablecoin issued by Anchorage on Solana
items.summary: Western Union launched a dollar stablecoin on Solana for 24/7 settlement across 200+ countries, the company said Monday.
items.title_zh: 西联汇款在 Solana 上推出 Anchorage 发行的 USDPT 稳定币
items.summary_zh: 西联汇款 (Western Union) 周一表示，在 Solana 上推出了美元稳定币，可在 200 多个国家/地区进行 24/7 全天候结算。

items.title: Where the goblins came from
items.summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
items.title_zh: 哥布林从哪里来
items.summary_zh: goblin 输出如何在 AI 模型中传播：时间线、根本原因以及 GPT-5 行为中个性驱动的怪癖背后的修复。

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型、Codex 和托管代理来到 AWS
items.summary_zh: OpenAI GPT 模型、Codex 和托管代理现已在 AWS 上提供，使企业能够在其 AWS 环境中构建安全的 AI。

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
items.title_zh: 我们对社区安全的承诺
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何通过模型保障、误用检测、策略执行以及与安全专家的协作来保护 ChatGPT 中的社区安全。

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
items.title_zh: Microsoft OpenAI 合作伙伴关系的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和微软宣布了一项修订后的协议，该协议简​​化了合作伙伴关系，增加了长期清晰度，并支持大规模的持续人工智能创新。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 4 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: Kalshi traders see April jobs report coming in better than economists' estimates
items.summary: The figure is higher than consensus estimates for 57,000 jobs gained in April, according to analysts polled by FactSet.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为四月份就业报告好于经济学家的预期
items.summary_zh: FactSet 调查的分析师称，这一数字高于 4 月份新增 57,000 个就业岗位的普遍预期。

items.title: Anthropic teams with Goldman, Blackstone and others on $1.5 billion AI venture targeting PE-owned firms
items.summary: The move marks Anthropic's latest effort to deepen its lead in the market for enterprise AI as competition intensifies with rivals including OpenAI
items.title_zh: Anthropic 与高盛、黑石等公司合作，针对私募股权公司发起 15 亿美元的人工智能风险投资
items.summary_zh: 随着与 OpenAI 等竞争对手的竞争加剧，此举标志着 Anthropic 为加深其在企业人工智能市场的领先地位而做出的最新努力

items.title: World Cup prize pool nears $900 million as FIFA boosts payouts. Here’s who gets what

items.title_zh: 随着国际足联增加奖金，世界杯奖金池接近 9 亿美元。这是谁得到什么
items.summary_zh: 国际足联即将举办的世界杯将成为有记录以来最赚钱的世界杯，奖金池将“破纪录”，而国际足联对其他争议不屑一顾。

items.title: Cautious optimism: Berkshire investors weigh future under new CEO Greg Abel

items.summary_zh: 随着新投资者和回归投资者权衡新任首席执行官领导下的公司发展方向，空气中弥漫着谨慎乐观的情绪。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway’s shopping extravaganza draws lighter crowds as spotlight shifts to Greg Abel
items.summary: Greg Abel made a point of stopping by every booth in the hall, greeting employees and shaking hands with shareholders.
items.title_zh: 随着聚光灯转向格雷格·阿贝尔，伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司的购物盛宴吸引了较少的人群
items.summary_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔特意在大厅的每个展位前停下来，向员工致意并与股东握手。

items.summary_zh: 当局称，事件发生后，一名 33 岁的德国公民被拘留。

items.title: Former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani recovering from pneumonia and 'now breathing on his own'

items.summary_zh: 据前纽约市长的发言人称，这位前纽约市长“仍处于危急但稳定的状态”。
